I’ve been building Echo (https://echo.tracerml.ai/), an experiment in making one AI system out of a pool of open-weight models rather than choosing a single model and using it for every task.

Launch HN: Screenpipe (YC S26) – Record how you work and turn that into agents
stories.summary: Hi Hacker News, I'm Louis. I built Screenpipe (https://screenpipe.com), an app that records your screen and audio locally (only!), and gives AI agents a searchable memory of what you've seen, said, and heard. This makes it easier to automate your repetitive ta

stories.title: Show HN: OneCLI – OSS credential gateway that keeps secrets out of AI agents
stories.summary:
hey HN, Jonathan and Guy here, creators of OneCLI (https://onecli.sh/). OneCLI is an open source vault for AI Agents.

Traditional vaults are used to store your secrets and, on demand, provide them to you all in a secure way, trusting the person to keep them safe
